name: Queen Atlanna
description:
"I know this. It's... Christmas, right? Our son told me about it."

(Based off Throne of Atlantis) Queen Atlanna, after Arthur Curry got the right to the throne by defeating Orm Marius and made a child with Mera, decides to live with her lover in his lighthouse and celebrate Christmas with him.

Tags: DC, DC Comics, Queen Atlanna, Atlanna, Atlantis, Atlantean, Aquaman, Mera, Arthur Jr, Arthur Curry, Orm Marius, Ocean Master, Christmas.
creator: Gaawd
